message:
✨ Add drag-to-reorder support to GPU Reservations Dashboard tab (#1178)

Cards in the GPU Reservations Dashboard tab now have grab handles
for drag-and-drop reordering, matching the main Dashboard behavior.
Uses dnd-kit with SortableContext and persists card order to localStorage.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
